creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
PORT-FIX-NO MAINTAINER : x11-fonts/ttmkfdir

According to :

http://people.freebsd.org/~fenner/portsurvey/ports@freebsd.org.html

the port x11-fonts/ttmkfdir has an unfetchable distfile.  After doing some
looking around I found that the site had moved.  The patch below reflects
this change.

Fix: This diff was generated by : diff -ruN ttmkfdir ttmkfdir.new
From : /usr/ports/x11-fonts
Also at : http://www.randomnetworks.com/freebsd/prs/ttmkfdir.diff
---------------------------------------------------------------------
